label: Ottawa-Gatineau Ontario-part new housing price index
description: Published Statistics Canada CPI or New Housing Price Index at native monthly frequency.
definition: Published Statistics Canada CPI or New Housing Price Index at native monthly frequency.
layer: Housing purchase prices and shelter costs
comparisonLimitations: Country baskets, weights, index bases, seasonal treatment, and housing institutions differ. Compare growth rates and within-country percentiles before levels.
interpretation: Property purchase-price changes are not equivalent to current shelter-service costs and are not universally supportive.
revisionStatus: Statistics Canada table 18-10-0205-01 may revise recent and historical observations; classifications and baskets follow the native table.
